scripts.build: vite build && esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --sourcemap --outfile=dist/server.cjs --external:sharp --external:fsevents --external:mongoose --external:mongodb --external:bson && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('dist/server.cjs','server.cjs'); console.log('OK: dist/server.cjs + server.cjs')"
scripts.build:cpanel: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const file='server.cjs'; if (!fs.existsSync(file) || fs.statSync(file).size === 0) { throw new Error('Missing prebuilt server.cjs. Run npm run build locally, then commit and push server.cjs.'); } console.log('Using prebuilt server.cjs; cPanel must not compile source files.')"
scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const p of ['dist','server.cjs','server.cjs.map']) { try { fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true}) } catch {} }"
